channel.title: Commvault Systems Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Commvault Systems Inc. (commvault).

item.title: CVE-2025-12776 · 1.8 LOW — Stored Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: The Report Builder component of the application stores user input directly in a web page and displays it to other users, which raised concerns about a possible Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attack. Proper management of this functionality helps ensure a…
